inputs.label: Year
inputs.businessContext: Gregorian year for which to calculate Easter date

businessContext_i18n.en: Gregorian year for which to calculate Easter date
businessContext_i18n.de: Gregorianisches Jahr, für das das Osterdatum berechnet werden soll

inputs.label: Days Adjustment
inputs.businessContext: Number of days to shift the computed Easter date

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of days to shift the computed Easter date
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hesaplanan Paskalya tarihine eklenecek gün sayısı
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Tage, um das berechnete Osterdatum zu verschieben

inputs.label: Algorithm Version
inputs.businessContext: Version of the computus algorithm (1 = Gregorian, 2 = Julian, not used in formula)

businessContext_i18n.en: Version of the computus algorithm (1 = Gregorian, 2 = Julian, not used in formula)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kullanılan hesaplama algoritmasının sürümü (1 = Gregoryen, 2 = Jülyen, formülde kullanılmaz)
businessContext_i18n.de: Version des Computus-Algorithmus (1 = gregorianisch, 2 = julianisch, nicht in Formel verwendet)

inputs.label: Moon Phase Offset
inputs.businessContext: Offset in days to adjust the paschal full moon calculation

businessContext_i18n.en: Offset in days to adjust the paschal full moon calculation
businessContext_i18n.tr: Paskalya dolunayı hesaplamasını ayarlamak için gün cinsinden ofset
businessContext_i18n.de: Versatz in Tagen zur Anpassung der Berechnung des Ostervollmonds

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
